port_metadata.vessel_dimension_source: International conventions on tonnage (G.T.) with legally established corrections
port_metadata.billing_basis: Tariffs are applied per maneuver, regardless of the number of tugs used.

cadiz_dock.description: Berth and unberth services at Cádiz Dock (Dársena de Cádiz)

other_docks_excluding_santa_maria.description: Berth and unberth services at Other Docks in Cádiz Bay (excluding Puerto de Santa María)

puerto_de_santa_maria.description: Berth and unberth services at Puerto de Santa María

industrial_facilities.description: Berth and unberth services at Navantia and Dragados Off-Shore Facilities

surcharges_and_multipliers.name: Towing Service Outside the Towing Line
surcharges_and_multipliers.description: Towing or escorting through bay waters beyond the general navigation channel line
surcharges_and_multipliers.applied_to: Rate established for berth or unberth in the destination dock

surcharges_and_multipliers.name: Dead Ship / Non-Propelled
surcharges_and_multipliers.description: Services rendered to vessels with rudders without use or engines not running

surcharges_and_multipliers.name: Zona Franca (Special Economic Zone)
surcharges_and_multipliers.geographic_application: Services within the Zona Franca area
surcharges_and_multipliers.exception: Not applicable in El Puerto de Santa María

surcharges_and_multipliers.name: Internal Movement (Same Dock)
surcharges_and_multipliers.description: Change of berth occurring on the same dock

surcharges_and_multipliers.name: Internal Movement (Different Berths)
surcharges_and_multipliers.description: Full service for change of berth between different interior locations
surcharges_and_multipliers.logic: 100% of unberth from origin + 50% of berth at destination

surcharges_and_multipliers.name: Internal Movement (Different Docks/Facilities)
surcharges_and_multipliers.logic: 100% of unberth from origin + 100% of berth at destination

extraordinary_services.start_trigger: Tugboat at agreed location at agreed time

delays.condition: Start or end delay > 30 minutes due to causes related to the vessel

cancellation_present.condition: Service suspended when tugs are already present at stipulated place/time

relevant_subtext.additional_tugs: Rates give right to usage of assigned tugs; additional tugs must be agreed separately regarding notice and availability.
relevant_subtext.language_precedence: Drawn up in Spanish; English version is a translation. In case of dispute, the Official Spanish text published by the Port Authority of Cadiz takes precedence.
relevant_subtext.standard_maneuver_definitions: Includes Towing Outside Line, Berthing, Unberthing, and Internal Movement as defined in section (b) of the document.
